arts.ttl: How much Real Madrid may have to pay to hire Xabi Alonso
arts.sum: Real Madrid could have to pay a record-breaking fee to break Xabi Alonso's Bayer Leverkusen contract and bring him back to the Spanish capital.

arts.ttl: Sacchi urges Milan and Roma to call Ancelotti, aims dig at Florentino Perez and Mbappé

arts.ttl: Rangers set to be slapped with UEFA charge over ugly Bilbao clashes as chief goes nuclear on a 'group of radicals'
arts.sum: Bilbao have been informed by UEFA that both they and Rangers can expect to be up on a charge

arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappe found GUILTY as ‘SEASON IN HELL’ ends with RIOT
arts.sum: On Friday, his hat-trick of misery was completed as Mbappe saw the Ligue 2 side he owns, SM Caen, relegated out of the French professional setup in front of more than 17,000 angry fans, some of whom invaded the pitch once their relegation was confirmed. Under Mbappe, Caen have taken a number of unpopular decisions, such as that to sack head coach Nicolas Seube, an iconic figure at the club.

arts.ttl: Ancelotti an option for Milan or Roma if Real Madrid exit confirmed
arts.sum: Real Madrid’s elimination from the Champions League is casting serious doubt on Carlo Ancelotti’s future...

arts.ttl: Real Madrid bosses approve €120m transfer move for Arsenal star who scored at the Bernabeu
arts.sum: Real Madrid president Florentino Perez and CEO Jose Angel Sanchez have reportedly both approved a potential €120m transfer package for Arsenal star Bukayo Saka. The Gunners forward has just impressed hugely in a big game at the Bernabeu, scoring the opening goal of the night in Wednesday’s Champions League quarter-final second leg. arts.ttl: Xabi Alonso dismisses ‘speculation and rumours’ after Real Madrid links
arts.sum: The Bayer Leverkusen manager has been mentioned as a possible successor to Carlo Ancelotti in the Spanish capital

arts.ttl: Real Madrid's future: Erik ten Hag the architect of a new era
arts.sum: With Carlo Ancelotti faltering as Real Madrid manager and his future beyond this season looking likely to be away from the Santiago Bernabeu, the question must be asked: who is fit to take over? At Real Madrid, he would take his clear football vision, tactical ingenuity and iron discipline.

Real Madrid are on a tricky run of form, winning just once in their last five games in all competitions. A win against Athletic Club is crucial as they look to bounce back from their disappointing two...

arts.ttl: More worry for Liverpool, Real Madrid “very interested” in another key star after Alexander-Arnold
arts.sum: Liverpool defender Ibrahima Konate has been linked with a move away from the club at the end of the season, and Real Madrid want to sign him.
